twitter_posts.author: Simon Willison

twitter_posts.title: R to @simonw: Update: it's fixed!
twitter_posts.description:
Update: it's fixed!


CJ Avilla (@cjav_dev)

This is fixed — the egress proxy was incorrectly blocking git/gh reads to public repos that weren't attached to the session. Clones/fetches work again if you start a fresh session.

Thanks for reporting, @simonw!



— https://nitter.ne
twitter_posts.author: Simon Willison
